title: Mona's Brews
description: Mona's Brews is a Vanilla+ data pack seeks to add in numerous custom beverages. They all have unique effects and utilities, and some can even get you drunk.
body:
Mona's Brews is a Vanilla+ data pack seeks to add in numerous custom beverages. Some are entirely fictional, some are references to other media, and some are real beverages. They all have unique effects and utilities, and some even contain alcohol (yes, you can get drunk.) They can all be created by throwing specific combinations of items into a cauldron. Click [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1a2wPT0w8tX5t7TlyhTB_SxA1IR4l4FgSthdsRyHJCy0/edit?usp=sharing) to see a spreadsheet of all recipes.

I seek to update this data pack further with new beverages to be brewed and enjoyed. This is the first data pack I've actually uploaded somewhere, so feedback and/or further ideas to improve the data pack would be greatly appreciated! Feel free to use this data pack for whatever content you produce as long as you provide credit.

Credits:

Data pack icon: u/rL0ad (Reddit)

Data pack help: Blobfish_Attack (PMC)
